title: Sandhurst
content:
Roof Restoration Sandhurst

Experience Quality Roof Restoration & Repairs In Sandhurst. Sandhurst Roofing provides high quality workmanship and outstanding customer service to all our customers. We deliver everything from gutter installation, gutter repairs, roof restorations, repairs and replacements, and more to the people of Sandhurst.

Our team is ready to repair or restore your roof; they are experienced, knowledgeable and highly skilled in working with all roofing materials. Our tradesmen can also work on all types of roofs, including flat metal, cement tiled, terracotta tiled or Colorbond roofing.

Get a Quote!

Roof Repair & Restoration Sandhurst

Sandhurst Roofing has over 30 years’ experience, making us one of Melbourne's most trusted family owned and operated business. We lead you through every part of the project and take the time to understand your unique requirements at every step.

We're licensed to help you with all your roofing needs, whether it’s for gutter repairs, re-roofing or roof restoration, all our services are fully insured. This safegaurds you and provides peace of mind that all of our workmanship will be finished to the greatest standard and quality.

Sandhurst Roofing provides experienced and truthful advice to Sandhurst residents and we're happy to supply a competitive quote.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Sandhurst

At Sandhurst Roofing, we use only the best quality brands and products; that’s why we us Colorbond Steel for all our guttering jobs. COLORBOND® steel is one of the most durable, reliable and versatile materials. Not only will your guttering last for years to come, but it will suit the pre-existing exterior of any home.

The repair or replacement of your gutters is important in keeping your property waterproof, as well as maintaining the curbside appeal of your home. Gutters take water away from the home, this prevents leaks, mould growth and rotting of important structures within the roof.

For all your guttering solutions call the team at Sandhurst Roofing today on 0448 812 800.

Are you ready to get your next roofing project underway? Then call Steve on 0448 812 800 for a quote. Alternatively you can use the form below and we’ll get back to you as soon as we can.
